q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares campaign vs non-campaign days (7.4% lift) but does not compare to an expected/baseline/assumed value from the prompt; the Poisson sqrt(6) is a noise estimate, not an expected baseline.
q_aware_rationale: The numerical values (6.259 vs 6.722, n=293 vs 72, ~0.46 difference, ~7.4%) are correctly summarized and a clear verdict ('too weak to firmly support') is given.
